artifact_scope: claim-level data-shape evidence model for compression, digest/checksum, dedupe, encryption, EC/archive, coalescing, and rebake result/refusal boundaries

non_overlap.successor_consumption_boundary: Successor/comparator wording remains fail-closed here; any later consumption belongs through #2048 after #2046 and #2047.

policy_inputs_required: compiled policy enabling compression for the subject scope
evidence_required: receipt binding transformed bytes to the policy revision
families.receipt_or_refusal_required: Success must cite the earned receipt; malformed frame, unsupported algorithm, stale policy, or missing verifier must return a typed refusal.
families.blocked_without: current transform execution evidence and decode/runtime rows

families.receipt_or_refusal_required: A digest label alone is not authority; the result must name the verification cut or refuse stale, missing, or contradictory evidence.
families.blocked_without: runtime rows proving mismatch and malformed-frame behavior

families.receipt_or_refusal_required: Cross-domain or unknown-domain dedupe must refuse; a matching digest cannot imply shared authority by itself.
Ciphertext presence does not prove encrypted authority; stale, wrong, or unknown key epochs must project typed refusal or degraded-visible state.
families.blocked_without: key-epoch runtime/fault rows and lifecycle evidence owned outside this issue

families.receipt_or_refusal_required: Shard bytes or EC labels cannot imply availability; under-width or unsupported media shape must refuse or expose degraded state.
families.blocked_without: degraded reconstruction and under-width runtime rows

families.receipt_or_refusal_required: Archive bytes do not imply low-latency serving or current degraded-read safety without a receipt naming that role.
Coalesced layout can improve cost only after legality gates pass; it cannot retire sources until replacement authority is published.
families.blocked_without: transform execution and source-retirement result records

families.receipt_or_refusal_required: Rebake intent, new layout, or transformed bytes do not imply source retirement, degraded-read safety, or successor wording before receipts say so.
families.blocked_without: action execution, result/refusal, and runtime transform evidence

claim_boundary.passes_here: This artifact defines the claim-level evidence model and fail-closed boundaries.
